prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `a8610ef7`.
codex_response:
Rule: each `8` is recolored by vertical self-overlap. If the cell in the vertically mirrored row at the same column is also `8`, it becomes `2`; otherwise it becomes `5`; `0` stays `0`.

The Opus hint was used as the starting hypothesis. The Sonnet hint was discarded and documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a8610ef7/notes.md#L1) because it claimed a checkerboard/modulo rule that the official examples contradict. The generator matches the task family by sampling explicit mirrored row-pair slots as overlap pairs vs one-sided singles, then filtering for the same dense 6x6 binary look seen in the official task. No new primitive was needed.

Validation passed: official verifier `5/5`, generated verifier `1000/1000`, and [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a8610ef7/previews/preview_01.png) was visually checked and looks on-distribution.
